query: Get vendor risk scores by querying vendor reliability data, then classify each vendor as low_risk, medium_risk, or high_risk based on incident history.

step_1_sql.query: SELECT publisher, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY transaction_count DESC LIMIT 10

step_2_consumer.task: Classify each publisher by risk tier: transaction_count >= 20 = high_risk, 5-19 = medium_risk, <5 = low_risk
